Description: Minimum contrast ratio for text is 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (WCAG AA). Use contrast checker tools.
Do: Use #000000 on #FFFFFF (21:1) or #1E293B on #F8FAFC (12:1). Check with WebAIM contrast checker.
Don't: Use #94A3B8 (slate-400) on #FFFFFF (3.4:1 - fails) or light grey text on white backgrounds.

Description: All interactive elements must have visible focus indicators for keyboard navigation. Focus ring should be clearly visible.
Do: Use ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-blue-500 in Tailwind. Make focus state 3px+ with high contrast color.
Don't: Remove focus outlines with outline-none without providing alternative focus styles.

Description: All meaningful images must have descriptive alt text. Decorative images should use empty alt or role='presentation'.
Don't: or without alt attribute.

Description: Icon-only buttons and links must have aria-labels describing their action for screen reader users.
Do: <button aria-label='Close dialog' onClick={handleClose}><XIcon /></button>
Don't: <button onClick={handleClose}><XIcon /></button> without any accessible label.

Description: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible. Tab order should match visual order. No keyboard traps.
Do: Use tabindex='0' for custom interactive elements. Test with Tab key navigation.
Don't: Use tabindex='-1' on focusable elements or create mouse-only interactions.

Description: All form inputs must have associated labels using the 'for' attribute or be wrapped in label elements.
Do: <label for='email'>Email Address</label><input id='email' type='email'>
Don't: Use placeholder text as the only label: <input placeholder='Email'> without associated label.

Description: All touch targets must be at least 44x44px (WCAG 2.1). Smaller targets cause frustration and errors.
Do: Use min-h-11 min-w-11 (44px) for buttons. Add padding to increase hit area.
Don't: Use small buttons like text-xs with p-1 (often <30px total).

Description: Avoid hover-dependent interactions on mobile. Use click/tap for primary actions. Hover states may not translate.
Do: Use onClick handlers for primary actions. Show mobile-specific states with @media (hover: none).
Don't: Use :hover for critical information or actions that only appear on hover.

Description: Disable interactive elements during async operations to prevent double-submission and show loading state.
Do: <button disabled={isLoading}>{isLoading ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</button>
Don't: Leave buttons clickable during async operations without feedback.

Description: Show clear error messages near the problem field. Don't rely on color alone. Provide suggestions for fixing.
Do: Please enter a valid email
Don't: Use only red border color to indicate errors without text explanation.

Description: All clickable/hoverable elements must have cursor-pointer to indicate interactivity.
Do: Add cursor-pointer class to cards, buttons, links, and any clickable elements.
Don't: Leave default cursor on clickable cards, menu items, or interactive elements.

Description: Use modern image formats (WebP, AVIF), implement lazy loading, and provide srcset for responsive images.
Don't: Use unoptimized PNG/JPG files >500KB without lazy loading or responsive srcset.

Description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for users who prefer reduced motion.
Do: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { * { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }
Don't: Always animate regardless of user preferences. No reduced-motion fallback.

Description: Reserve space for dynamic content to prevent layout shift. Use aspect-ratio or explicit dimensions.
Don't: Load images without dimensions causing Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS).

Description: Always include viewport meta tag with width=device-width and initial-scale=1 for proper mobile rendering.
Do: <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'>
Don't: Omit viewport meta tag or use fixed width like width=1200.

Description: Body text should be at least 16px on mobile to prevent iOS zoom on focus and ensure readability.
Do: Use text-base (16px) or text-lg (18px) for body text on mobile.
Don't: Use text-sm (14px) or text-xs (12px) for body text on mobile.

Description: Ensure content fits viewport width. No horizontal scrolling on mobile devices.
Do: Use max-w-screen overflow-x-hidden or responsive containers.
Don't: Allow content to overflow horizontally on mobile, creating horizontal scroll.

Description: Define a consistent z-index scale to prevent stacking context issues and overlapping elements.
Do: Define z-index layers: 10 (dropdowns), 20 (sticky), 30 (modals), 40 (popovers), 50 (toolties).
Don't: Use random z-index values like z-999 or z-[9999] without a defined scale.

Description: Use line-height of 1.5-1.75 for body text to ensure readability. Tighter for headings.
Do: body { line-height: 1.6; } h1, h2, h3 { line-height: 1.2; }
Don't: Use line-height: 1 for body text (too tight) or line-height: 2.5 (too loose).

Description: Limit line length to 65-75 characters for optimal readability. Use max-width constraints.
Do: max-w-prose or max-w-2xl (672px) for content containers.
Don't: Allow text to span full screen width (150+ characters per line).
